title: Saiyan Awakening
description: Adds a Saiyan as a transformation for the Alien Evolution Addon
body:
![banner_sa](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/70ea77bfde19cf9c947820ef119a3839ff3642be.png) ### Saiyan Awakening is an Addon to Alien Evolution that adds Saiyan as a transformation for Minecraft 1.20.1. The goal to this addon is to respect the vision of the Dragon Ball franchise and its community. All aspects of this addon are created to be faithful and accurate, yet balanced and integrated to expand to the Omnitrix's arsenal of aliens. Expect updates adding new features, mobs, transformations, and structures as we continue development on this project. **Join the discord server! Become a part of the community and view early teasers, ask questions, and suggest features!**
![segment_sa](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0c3c3036461881307603b9754ec2fdd9b4f0e8c9.png) [![Discord](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c261b79b33380118369f4deb3bd4a6ce0df8202f.png)](https://discord.gg/W5ZwaQbwan) [![YouTube](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/42f9bb962b4558f1f11480e0ab885261c373f482.png)](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=J9sX77R1kAA) [![Ko-Fi](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3a947a55948cefe3a8dda706f9a2e9eda11f04d8.png)](https://ko-fi.com/pugmeowla) ![segment_sa](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0c3c3036461881307603b9754ec2fdd9b4f0e8c9.png)
## Meet The Team! [![pugmeowla](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/891a2035f50e27ecfc4632ac2ab24ba1d5bddc29.png)](https://modrinth.com/user/Pugmeowla) **Original Owner** [![spartan](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/27017ca8ff9d10bf5b737259c2b9e8bb1c2e111a.png)](https://modrinth.com/user/SpartanGamezFTB) **Coder + Sucessor** [![stephen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0ea86b9d308693fc88d3e85283cdcab28641a770.png)](https://modrinth.com/user/konadolomite) **Assets Provider** [![Jeff](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b85be6ce3cbfcf274060cc08f6473e6d5431755e.png)](https://modrinth.com/user/MiracleJeff) **Assets Provider** ![segment_sa](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0c3c3036461881307603b9754ec2fdd9b4f0e8c9.png) ### GRAVESTONE NEEDED AS A DEPENDENCY!! ![segment_sa](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0c3c3036461881307603b9754ec2fdd9b4f0e8c9.png) ## [REVAMP] Pugmeowla (me) rewrote the whole mod again :) ssj1-3 and ozaru only works much better than before. There are many, many changes with the mod You get skillpoints from killing enough things, and taking enough damage. THE CURRENT STATS METHOD Starts off at HP 20 Attack 1 Def 5 Toughness 5 You can use 1 skill point to increase: health +2 Attack +1 Defence +2 (which also adds toughness +2) with no current cap the ssj is x1.5 ssj2 x2 ssj3 x2.5 Example: I upgraded Health once: my base is now 22 HP when i use ssj1 it is now 33 ssj2 -> 44 ssj3 -> 55
